rationale: Article VIII §1-d governs agricultural-use land assessment, unrelated to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: All land owned by natural persons which is designated for agricultural use in accordance with the provisions of this Section shall be assessed for all tax purposes on the consideration of only those factors relative to such agricultural use.
_note: Rule text concerns agricultural use valuation only; no reference to homestead exemptions.
